name: Word2 Vec
description: Transforms vectors of words into vectors of numeric codes for the purpose of further processing by NLP or machine learning algorithms.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and transforms it to another DataFrame
output: A new column containing feature vector is added to the incoming DataFrame

fields.name: inputColStringArrCol
fields.title: Text Array Column
fields.description: The text array column which is produced

fields.name: numPartitions
fields.title: Num Partitions
fields.description: Number of partitions for sentences of words

fields.name: windowSize
fields.title: Window Size
fields.description: The window size (context words from [-window, window])

fields.name: maxSentenceLength
fields.title: Max Sentence Length
fields.description: Sets the maximum length (in words) of each sentence in the input data. Any sentence longer than this threshold will be divided into chunks of up to maxSentenceLength
